message:
Command `MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
WRAPPER_V="$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v"

echo "=== Validate patched file: port count in header ==="
python3 - << 'PYEOF'
import re
with open("/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v.patched") as f:
    content = f.read()

# Find module header
m = re.search(r'module\s+\w+\s*\((.*?)\);', content, re.DOTALL)
if m:
    port_section = m.group(1)
    ports = [p.strip() for p in port_section.split(',') if p.strip()]
    # Count inout/input/output declarations
    inouts = [p for p in ports if p.strip().startswith('inout')]
    print(f"Module port section found")
    print(f"Total port declarations: {len(ports)}")
    # Count ports in original
    print(f"Expected: 1391 - 102 = 1289 ports")
else:
    print("ERROR: module header not found")

# Check internal wires exist
wires = re.findall(r'^wire (\w+amuxbus\w*);', content, re.MULTILINE)
print(f"Internal amuxbus wire declarations: {len(wires)}")
print(f"First few: {wires[:3]}")
PYEOF

echo ""
echo "=== Check no remaining amuxbus in port list ==="
# Look at lines around first amuxbus in patched file
grep -n "amuxbus_a\|amuxbus_b" "$WRAPPER_V.patched" | grep "inout" | wc -l
echo "inout amuxbus lines (should be 0)"` executed with exit code 0.

content:
=== Validate patched file: port count in header ===
Module port section found
Total port declarations: 1289
Expected: 1391 - 102 = 1289 ports
Internal amuxbus wire declarations: 100
First few: ['clk_amuxbus_a', 'clk_amuxbus_b', 'reset_n_amuxbus_a']

=== Check no remaining amuxbus in port list ===
0
inout amuxbus lines (should be 0)
